passed_scoped_phases: Phase 02P nuclear pore complexes and gate cores
repeated_issues: Procedural curve components can quickly become too geometric unless inspected against the baseline render.
Source art can pass Blender visual gates while still requiring Roblox LOD, decimation, or texture baking.
Reference-board camera composition still needs a final presentation pass after all nucleus components are present.
current_quality_notes: Membrane, pores, lamina, nucleoplasm, and chromatin are approved as corrective source-art phases.
Nucleolus improved after a lumpy-core and higher-density granule pass; it remains approved only as scoped source art, with polish debt around lobe fusion and final presentation framing.
No full-nucleus approval has been issued yet.
recommended_next_phase: Phase 06T Transport_Cargo only: protein import particles and RNA/ribosomal subunit export cues, with DNA explicitly forbidden from leaving the nucleus.
